title: HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY CAVE JUNCTION HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and Hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 200 W Watkins Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Tuesday noon-3pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in during clinic hours. Call or visit website for testing schedule. FEES: Suggested donation of $25; no one turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Tuesday noon-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located within Immanuel Methodist Church Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
